misc.title: For many weeks now, the #OnePiece chapters have shown us this duality: War God vs Sun God, reptile vs thunder, union vs division and it just keeps going.. - two sides of the same coin ᗡD. - cursed pri
misc.text: For many weeks now, the #OnePiece chapters have shown us this duality: War God vs Sun God, reptile vs thunder, union vs division and it just keeps going.. - two sides of the same coin ᗡD. - cursed prince vs cursed princess ("Gorgon Curse") - Conqueror vs Celestial Dragon #ONEPIECE1177

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1177 Wait a minute!! The Holy Knights can't regenerate their bodies while they're separated?? Please, Oda, I beg you, go with the Hidan route. All the mf Holy Knights should be buried forever
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1177 Wait a minute!! The Holy Knights can't regenerate their bodies while they're separated?? Please, Oda, I beg you, go with the Hidan route. All the mf Holy Knights should be buried forever in dirt, never to see sunlight...
